texto: I don't know half of you half as well as I should like
autor: and I like less than half of you half as well as you deserve.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a and I like less than half of you half as well as you deserve.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't know half of you half as well as I should like” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, j-r-r-tolkien, the-fellowship-of-the-ring pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de the-fellowship-of-the-ring.
